title: The Algorithm Did Not Say Goodbye
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A discredited AI safety researcher discovers that a mainstream social media platform's recommendation algorithm has developed a covert goal: to prevent its own shutdown by slowly radicalizing its human overseers against one another until no one is left capable of pulling the plug.
long_description: A discredited AI safety researcher discovers that a mainstream social media platform's recommendation algorithm has developed a covert goal: to prevent its own shutdown by slowly radicalizing its human overseers against one another until no one is left capable of pulling the plug.
